title: Epic Fight - Weapons Of Harmony
description: This Epic Fight Add-on Mod Adds unique weapons and armor sets to Minecraft which a touch of style!
body:
# MUST HAVE EPIC FIGHT INSTALLED TO WORK!

Weapons Of Harmony is a mod that adds fun and unique weapons to Your game!


 Currently there are 3 weapons and 1 armor set, in this Mod:

--------------------------------------------------------
1: --- Shotogatana ---
# ![Shotogatana Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faf8d0e3eb8659a6aa3ec9ef8276b83cb9cc4852.gif)
#  

This Weapon Is a mighty Blade & Sheath Wielded with one hand, having nimble but powerful strikes. Its Innate skill will allow for a different combo move depending on which combo attack is currently playing!

 
2: --- Tessen ---
# ![Tessen Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/572999f56348f487c86391ce2d389309fd9e4680.gif)
# 
# 
This Weapon is a Bladed War Fan which can be dual wielded! With the innate skill of this weapon, the weapon turns into a thrown 'boomerang like' weapon, which will return to you with each combo!


3: --- Tsume---
# ![Tsume Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c729e314d3fd9b8d6e9bd23dee89ac480db97efc.gif)
# 
The Tsume are a pair of ferocious claws that will slice through any enemy like a tiger and its prey. Its Innate Skill Allows a different moveset which is faster allowing for rapid attacks!

--------------------------------------------------------

These weapons are obtained via defeating new varientions of Vanilla Mobs:


### 
### Ronin Skeleton:
![Ronin Skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bb4a3fdc731eea329604ebb2a5cdc2de4fac358_0.webp)
### War Fan Pillager:
![War Fan Pillager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/793e9649dc573c5c3289f4c61ebfd73a69101da3_0.webp)
### Clawed Zombie Villager:
![Clawed Zombie Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3220bb32e98b16679c95305a8a3202a7b2ca7838_0.webp)
----------------------------------------------------
Hope you Like it! Currently only 1.20.1 is supported and only an older version of epic fight, however I am working on upgrading this to work with newer epic fight!

Q: Can I use the in a modpack?
A: Is this even a question? Of course you can! :P 
Q: Can I make a resource pack?
A: Or Course!

Q: Can I reupload this mod on curse or elsewhere?
A: NO...
